pom.xml.general_idea: Upgraded Spring Boot parent version from 2.6.4 to 3.2.0 to align with Java 21 support and modern framework features.
Updated Java version properties and compiler plugin configuration to target Java 21.
Replaced the legacy MySQL connector artifact with the new JDBC-compliant artifact required for Spring Boot 3.
Replaced Springfox OpenAPI with SpringDoc OpenAPI Starter, which is the standard for Spring Boot 3.
